entry.title: SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA – Updated Transport to Production Strategy for Rapid Activation
entry.content:
If you are operating with SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA, you will need to transport your launchpad content, layout, and other configuration settings from your Development to your Production environment. You can now find an updated document with the latest advice on the transport strategy for SAP Fiori Rapid Activation and related SAP Fiori objects at

SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA - Rapid Activation Transport Move to Production Strategy

 

What is SAP Fiori Rapid Activation?

As a reminder, the SAP Fiori Rapid Activation procedure lets you, as a system administrator, quickly activate the capabilities of the SAP Fiori launchpad and SAP Fiori applications using a series of task lists.

Refer to

  • As explained in the central note for all SAP S/4HANA releases, SAP Note 2902673 - Rapid Activation for SAP Fiori in SAP S/4HANA - Overview
  • SAP Help - SAP Fiori Overview - Rapid Activation of SAP Fiori
  • SAP Blog - SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA – Activate SAP Fiori in 1 day or less - the video playlist and FAQ
  • SAP Blog - SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA – Creating your custom business roles – the end-to-end process and video playlist

What’s changed in this version?

This document has the latest information for SAP S/4HANA 2023 release including

  • Considerations for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition customers
  • Clearer explanation of how transport of Rapid Activation works
  • Prerequisites for transporting Rapid Activation
  • Which task lists to run on implementation versus upgrade
  • Mandatory/Optional tasks to run in Development versus subsequent systems
  • Critical parameters for transports
  • Coverage of new task list SAP_FIORI_FCM_CATALOG_ACTIVATION
  • How to transport settings in other Rapid Activation tools such as Launchpad configuration parameters in transaction /UI2/FLP_CUS_CONF

For official guidance for your SAP S/4HANA release and FPS, always refer to the Composite SAP note: Rapid Activation for SAP Fiori in SAP S/4HANA <release> <FPSxx>" for your SAP S/4HANA release and FPS (example: SAP Note 3469488 - Composite SAP note: Rapid Activation for SAP Fiori in SAP S/4HANA 2023 FPS02)

The links to these SAP notes are available in the document.

Becoming a SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA guru


You’ll find much more on the community topic page for SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA

Other helpful links in the SAP Community:

  • See all questions and answers about SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA 
  • Follow SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA for more blogs and updates 
  • Ask a Question about SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA


Brought to you by the SAP S/4HANA Customer Care and RIG

entry.title: SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA – [Updated] Moving from Standalone to Embedded Deployment in SAP Fiori
entry.content:
As you may already know, SAP recommends deploying SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA with your SAP Fiori Front-End Server in embedded mode (embedded FES) , as outlined in the SAP Fiori Deployment Options and System Landscape Recommendations. 

Embedded FES reduces server cost and complexity and simplifies ongoing operations as you grow your usage of SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA innovations.

If you began your SAP S/4HANA journey with a SAP Fiori Front-End Server in standalone mode (standalone FES), you might be asking:
How do I transition from standalone FES to embedded FES deployment?

The Regional Implementation Group for SAP S/4HANA has worked with many customers to help them move to SAP Fiori Front-End Server Embedded deployment. Based on these experiences, we have created the first version of the document in 2019 as an easy-to-follow, step-by-step guide. This guide outlined the migration process, explaining both the technical setup and how to ensure a smooth experience for users.

We’re excited to announce our updated Moving from Standalone to Embedded Deployment in SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA guide based on SAP S/4HANA release 2023.

This new version provides more streamlined steps, updated tools and further recommendations to help you successfully move from standalone FES to embedded FES deployment.

Moving from Standalone to Embedded Deployment in SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA

Why do you need this guide?

This guide is essential for SAP S/4HANA customers who are looking to move from a standalone FES to an embedded FES deployment. It provides clear, step-by-step instructions to make the transition smooth, covering both technical and practical aspects of the migration.

Whether you are upgrading your SAP S/4HANA system or aligning with SAP's latest architectural recommendations, this guide ensures you have everything you need i.e. from planning, installation, and configuration to post-migration testing and optimization. It helps you:

  • Understand the benefits of moving to embedded FES deployment.
  • Know the right time to make the shift.
  • Navigate technical prerequisites, sizing, and system considerations.
  • Simplify the migration process with actionable steps, tools, and examples.
  • Ensure a seamless experience for users by resolving common issues.
  • Minimize disruptions by retaining user personalization and role assignments.
  • Gain tips on how to enhance usability and performance

By following this guide, you can align with SAP best practices to unlock the full potential of SAP Fiori embedded FES deployment.

 

What's in it / What's new?

  • Enhance performance with tips for optimizing launchpad features, OData services, and app configurations

    • This includes reviewing and improving performance for SAP GUI Apps, SAP Fiori Apps, SAP Fiori Launchpad etc. and best practices to adjust and transport launchpad configuration parameters
  • Why and how to use Clean Core SAP Fiori administration tools to perform the migration
    • Clean core tools like Launchpad Content Manager, Launchpad Application Manager, Manage Launchpad Pages, Manage Launchpad Spaces provide enhanced capabilities compared to classical tools like Launchpad Designer. 
  • Structured 6-Step Content Migration
    • Comprehensive steps to migrate roles, catalogs, spaces and pages.
  • User Personalization Retention
    • Tools like /UIF/MIGRATE_FES_PERSO to migrate homepages, private views, and UI changes.
  • Multi-Client Activation
    • Detailed guidance on enabling and configuring new clients post-migration.
  • Improved Testing and Troubleshooting
    • Expanded scenarios for UAT, error handling using App Support, and validation tools.
  • Performance and usability enhancements
    • Parameters for faster navigation, optimized search, and stateful SAP GUI containers.
  • Web Dispatcher Guidance
    • Steps to switch from Standalone to Embedded without changing end-user URLs.

 

Becoming a SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA guru

You’ll find much more on our  SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA topic page

Other helpful links:

  • See all questions and answers about SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA 
  • Follow SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA for more blogs and updates 
  • Ask a Question about SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA

Brought to you by the SAP S/4HANA RIG and Customer Care team.

entry.title: The SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502 Early Release Series Starts Next Week!
entry.content:
GROW with SAP is a comprehensive package combining solutions, services, community support, and learnings to help businesses of all sizes successfully adopt cloud ERP. At its core lies SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, our fully-fledged cloud ERP designed to optimize processes and drive intelligent, sustainable operations. 

The SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Early Release Series is a biannual event showcasing live sessions led by product experts. These sessions provide an exclusive preview of upcoming innovations, including AI-driven features and advancements with Joule, tailored to selected lines of business and industries. Spanning several days, the series offers expert demos, insider previews, and real-time Q&A, giving participants a first look at exciting updates and the opportunity to get their questions answered directly.

From January 21 to January 24, 2025, we'll start the year with 21 compelling live sessions to highlight the exciting innovations shipped with the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502 release. Take advantage of the entire series or pick and choose the sessions most relevant to you.

 

Register here:

Artificial Intelligence & AnalyticsClick me!
Enterprise Portfolio and Project ManagementClick me!
Professional ServicesClick me!
Solution Orders and Subscription BillingClick me!
SalesClick me!
Cross Technology TopicsClick me!
Environment, Health, and SafetyClick me!
RetailClick me!
Supply ChainClick me!
SAP User ExperienceClick me!
Public SectorClick me!
ManufacturingClick me!
Sourcing and ProcurementClick me!
Governance, Risk, and ComplianceClick me!
ServiceClick me!
FinanceClick me!
Two-Tier ERPClick me!
ExtensibilityClick me!
Product ComplianceClick me!
Asset ManagementClick me!
SAP Activate, SAP Cloud ALM, Test Automation ToolClick me!

 

Sign-Up Instructions:

An active SAP Learning Hub license is required to register for the live sessions and to consume the recordings. Find out how to sign up​

  • As a customer:​ Access to at least the SAP Enterprise Support Edition is required. Follow these steps to sign up:​
    1. Navigate to the sign-up page and click on the “sign up” button.​
    2. Authenticate yourself with your S-user ID and password.​
    3. The system will check your eligibility, create a new SAP Learning Hub user, and populate your learning catalogue. This process may take up to 2 hours.​
    4. You will receive a registration confirmation via e-mail once the registration process is complete.​
  • As a partner: Partners can access the live sessions and recordings through the SAP Partner Edge Edition.​
    ​
  • As an SAP internal: Register here for the SAP Learning Hub Internal Edition (free of charge) by clicking on "access".​

Experiencing issues? Make sure to be logged on before registering. In case of any other issues, reach out to SAP S/4HANA Cloud Live Product Expert Sessions.

Find out more about our live product expert sessions here.

entry.title: Highlights of the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502 Release
entry.content:
Welcome to a new era of innovation and seamless integration with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502! As we usher in 2025, it's the perfect time to celebrate the incredible journey we've shared with our public Cloud ERP community. Over the years, our customers have quickly gained extensive upgrade experience, all thanks to our continuous and seamless feature delivery. Reflecting on this progress, it's astonishing to note that our 33 major SaaS ERP release upgrades are equivalent to encapsulating 130+ years of upgrade experience based on the traditional on-premise deployment models. This showcases the high standard of our SaaS model. With the clean core approach and full lifecycle compliance embedded, we enable customers to harness the latest features instantly.

As our technological landscape continues to evolve, SAP remains at the forefront, driving innovations that empower businesses. I am excited to walk you through my key highlights of the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502 release.

Get ready for an exciting array of updates, including powerful AI enhancements, expanded capabilities of our generative AI co-pilot, Joule, and groundbreaking ERP innovations. Our 2502 release is here to further automate your operations, underpin agility in a cloud-first environment and drive more of your processes towards zero touch. Stay tuned as we dive into these transformative developments.

If you prefer watching rather than reading, you are welcome to check out my product update video: 

Figure 1: Check out my top highlights of the release in this video. 

 

AI-Powered UX Enhancements: Transforming User Interaction with Joule

Joule, our generative AI co-pilot, revolutionizes user experience by streamlining tasks through instant insights and intuitive navigation via natural language input. One notable feature is the new personalized card creation, enabling users to swiftly access vital ERP data such as purchase orders and delivery updates, thus, enhancing decision-making processes.

Figure 2: Get instant insights and swift access to your data with our natural language, generative AI copilot, Joule.

 

 

Our AI-driven UX innovations, AI-assisted smart summarization and AI-assisted easy filter, initially released as beta shipments in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408, have now become generally available. Smart summarization leverages artificial intelligence to condense complex data into easily understandable summaries, saving time and boosting efficiency. Easy filter allows users to apply detailed filters using natural language, simplifying data exploration.

Figure 3: AI-assisted smart summarization saves time and boosts efficiency by condensing complex data into easily understandable summaries.

 

 

Figure 4: AI-assisted easy filter simplifies data exploration and reduces effort.

 

 

As we progress with AI-assisted UX features, the upcoming SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502 release introduces remarkable advancements in beta testing. These include: 

  • AI-assisted easy enterprise search,
  • AI-assisted smart personalization of My Home,  
  • and AI-assisted error explanation.  

Sign up through this link to start testing.

 

Enhancing Carbon Accountability with SAP Green Ledger

SAP Green Ledger is a transformative financial solution at the heart of carbon accounting. This is designed to integrate seamlessly with connected systems such as ERP and sustainability. By extending the scope of financial accounting to encompass carbon, it applies the principles of double-entry accounting to carbon quantities. These are posted on dimensions relevant to business steering, like profit centers and segments, offering a tangible perspective on carbon impact from provisioning through to delivery. The value proposition of SAP Green Ledger lies in its ability to track, value, and report the carbon footprint of end-to-end operations, with an emphasis on producing auditable and trustworthy reports. By analyzing carbon data alongside financial attributes, it generates insights pivotal for informed decision-making.

 

Figure 5: SAP Green Ledger integrates seamlessly with connected systems such as ERP and sustainability.

 

 

The key capabilities include integration support with other systems, replication of financial master data, importation and enrichment of material movements with carbon information and exporting carbon data for group reporting. Through its robust allocation management and comprehensive visualization, SAP Green Ledger allows businesses to compare carbon data directly with financial data, enhancing strategic understanding and operational transparency.

 

Enhancing Quality Management with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502: Expanding the “Manage Certificate Receipts” App with Create Mode

The SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502 release introduces the create mode in the “Manage Certificate Receipts” app, building on the foundation of innovations introduced in the 2408 release. The original app allowed users to manage and link quality certificates to purchasing documents and goods receipts which improves compliance and traceability. The new Create Mode adds flexibility by enabling users to record certificates received before goods arrive, e.g., by email, and link them to material records upon arrival.

Figure 6: Record certificate receipts before goods arrival, ensuring smoother inventory processes.

 

This enhancement also improves traceability by providing access to existing certificates tied to purchasing documents and items, ensuring complete visibility across processes. Reduce potential error sources and strengthen both transparency and compliance processes with the further evolution of our certificate management capabilities. This enhancement solidifies the Manage Certificate Receipts App as a vital tool for higher efficiency.

 

Unlocking Transformation with GROW with SAP on AWS: A New Era in Cloud ERP

Having your Experience evolution on mind, I´d like to point you to GROW with SAP on AWS, an initiative that seamlessly integrates SAP's undeniable ERP expertise with AWS's expansive cloud infrastructure. With this, SAP is offering transformative solutions for organizations adopting SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition. This alliance is a milestone in delivering extraordinary value, tailored for a diverse array of industries, scalability, security, and innovation. GROW with SAP on AWS features a modular design with prebuilt, industry-specific capabilities which allows businesses to scale effortlessly. Rapid deployment is facilitated by proven methodologies such as SAP Activate. Businesses can transition to even swifter deployments.

Figure 7: GROW with SAP on AWS.

 

 

The collaboration on AWS Marketplace simplifies procurement and accelerates adoption, empowering companies to thrive with agility and resilience in today's digital economy. GROW with SAP on AWS emerges beyond ERP, as a transformative enabler that drives the digital transformation frontier forward.

 

Expanding Opportunities with Scalable Solutions: Empowering Partners Through ABAP Cloud Add-Ons

With the general availability of scalable solutions on stack, partners are now equipped to build and extend solutions for their customers, creating significant value and expanding capabilities. This empowerment enables partners to develop, package, and broadly distribute their solutions as ABAP Cloud add-ons, reaching a larger customer base effectively.  Partners begin by developing their extensions within their own landscape and under their own namespace. After thorough testing, the solution is registered and assembled into an installable package. Once published by the partner, it becomes available to customers on the SAP Store. Customers can explore all their purchased and available products using the Discover Product app and can subsequently deploy these solutions in their three-system landscape.

Figure 8: Expand opportunities with scalable solutions.

 

 

This approach greatly complements the existing side-by-side extensibility concept to scale applications according to growing demand, ensuring they stay agile and responsive to rapid market changes. Partners can leverage these capabilities to innovate and differentiate themselves in the competitive market, aligning their offerings closely with customer needs and business requirements as an additional option.

For more information click here. 

 

Advancing Project Efficiency: Innovations in SAP Activate Release

In the ongoing evolution of SAP Activate, we are committed to enhancing our implementation and operational guidance, continuously leveraging insights from customer projects and, in this case, early adopters of Project Lines. Our latest release introduces refined guidance in project management, which enables teams to streamline their workflows and optimize resource allocation. We have also introduced improvements in receiving provisioned environments, making it easier and faster for customers to get started with their projects. Additionally, we have enhanced the identification of activities related to the GROW Adoption Plan, ensuring that users can seamlessly integrate these into their strategic roadmaps.

Another major advancement I’d like to mention is the integration of the “SAP Activate road map viewer” into the “SAP for Me” platform.

Figure 9: SAP Activate Road Map view.

 

 

This transition simplifies access for all users of the comprehensive methodology content of SAP Activate. Seamless learning and efficient project planning are important ingrediencies of a transformed demand with 5 generations of users.

 

Key Summary

In a nutshell, The SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502 release introduces a balanced mix of infrastructure and experience investments, enhanced AI-driven user experiences, embedded AI features, and new or enhanced ERP capabilities, rounded off by the innovative SAP Green Ledger for integrated carbon accounting within financial systems. Additionally, ABAP Cloud Add-Ons give partners an additional tool at hands to extend and differentiate solutions effectively.


Another release that paves the way for businesses to optimize efficiency, scalability, and sustainability in their transformed ERP operations. As all previous releases, it is our invitation to you to join us in the ERP revolution and start your transformative journey. Keep exploring us and keep challenging us to unlock your company's full potential in the evolving digital landscape. Stay tuned for further details in the individual blog posts diving deeper into selected lines of business and industries.

Don’t hesitate to leave a comment and check out our community page to ask your questions and engage with the experts. Follow the PSCC_Enablement tag to stay up to date with our latest blog posts. 

Feel free to follow me at BeSchulze and on LinkedIn to not miss any updates. 

Yours, Bert

entry.title: Artificial Intelligence and Other Intelligent ERP Use Cases in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502
entry.content:
Artificial Intelligence is reshaping industries by making businesses smarter, more efficient, and more adaptable. We at SAP are at the forefront of this transformation, empowering organizations to harness the full potential of artificial intelligence.

You certainly have read that SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition is in general availability and will be release to our customers, for more check the release blog from @BeSchulze. In this blog post, we will have a close look at the "intelligent technologies" like AI and machine learning that are at the heart of the Cloud ERP and will help our customer run better.

For your convenience, we created this product update video that will give you a summary of what's key in the "Intelligent ERP" product update with the release 2502.

Joule, Our Natural Language, GenAI Copilot

Joule is the AI copilot for the business. Joule’s AI agents perform autonomous tasks and work together through workflows across all domains of your business including supply chain, procurement, and finance to deliver connected, enterprise-wide business outcomes. 

I am happy to announce that Joule is now generally available. With intuitive interaction, Joule transforms complex tasks into simple, efficient actions, offering instant insights, quick navigation, and guidance when needed.

Joule’s card creation feature in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502 offers quick, customized snapshots of important data—like purchase orders or delivery updates—right where you need them. Not only does this save time, it also offers a great user experience!

You will find more details in this video.

AI-Assisted UX

User Experience plays a critical for a Cloud ERP,  it shapes how how customers engage with and build trust in the software. In this release as well, AI is brining our Cloud ERP user experience to the next level.

Assisted smart summarization and easy filter are here to facilitate your tasks like never before! Smart summarization leverages generative AI to summarize object pages within SAP Fiori elements-based applications. Users can review, edit, and copy these summaries into productivity tools for efficient follow-ups. It improves business data understanding, saves time, and delivers trustworthy results with easy editing. Capabilities include section selection for summarization, a structured output with a rich text editor for edits, and seamless integration for follow-ups. 

AI-assisted smart summarization.

Easy filter simplifies the process of filtering list reports of SAP Fiori elements-based applications using natural language. It harnesses the power of generative AI to streamline query inputs, providing a more intuitive experience than traditional manual filtering methods. Users can conveniently access recent and favorite queries. The innovation improves business data understanding, saves time when filtering based on known criteria, and ensures trustworthy AI results. It supports sophisticated filtering criteria and allows recent filters to be marked as favorites.

AI-assisted easy filter.

These features were shipped through a beta testing in last release and are now generally available with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502.

Beta shipments are a great way of testing innovations and enhancements early on. With this release, we ship three more use cases through beta testing:

  • AI-assisted easy enterprise search: This tool enables natural language search capabilities within SAP Fiori launchpad, powered by generative AI. It streamlines the search for business objects, offering a more intuitive, efficient user experience. Key features include natural language support in the search field, adjustable settings for enabling this capability at the end-user level, and the indication of active natural language support within the search interface.
  • AI-assisted error explanation: The AI-assisted error explanation tool enhances users' understanding of errors in SAP Fiori elements-based applications, providing recommendations and solutions through generative AI. It integrates directly with error visualization, enabling one-click action to generate explanations. The innovation saves time, offers better insights into errors, and fosters an intuitive user experience. It presents a well-structured explanation containing error details and recommended solutions.
  • AI-assisted personalization of My Home: The smart personalization feature allows users to use natural language through generative AI to add insights cards to their My Home experience. It facilitates quick and easy customization of My Home with efficiently generated insights cards, previewed before addition to ensure data quality. It supports a variety of SAP Fiori elements-based apps as the basis for insights card creation, providing a time-saving, intuitive user experience with reliable AI results.

Finance and Risk Innovations Leveraging Joule

Finance is the backbone of every company: investing, reporting, budgeting, saving,... in all those domains, Joule can support business user by making the different processes seamless, more efficient, more reliable.

As you remember, I’ve shown you two use cases in beta shipments in my last product update. I am happy to share that the financial business insights into the cost center review booklet as well as the configuration for US tax jurisdictions are now generally available!

Extended Situations in the To Do section of My Home help manage complex tasks by providing AI-powered insights and actionable alerts. This feature streamlines task management by integrating situation handling, keeping you informed and focused without switching between lists and emails.

In this release, we help you stay updated on business issues, and make quick, informed decisions with Joule!

The integration of SAP's AI copilot Joule with Situation Handling enables users to receive up-to-date information on demand. Joule displays relevant issues, shares additional information, and directs users to the appropriate apps, ensuring a continuous overview of responsibilities while working on their daily tasks.

And you can now streamline decision-making with targeted recommendations using genAI!

Generative AI enhances Situation Handling by providing targeted recommendations to streamline decision-making. The extended My Situations app generates AI-driven solutions based on data context from SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition and external data via a chosen large language model (LLM). This integration leverages SAP Business Technology Platform for intelligent, context-aware recommendations, improving issue resolution efficiency. 

This innovation is being shipped through a beta testing. Sign up via this link: https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#campaign/3825”

Machine Learning Scenario

SAP Ariba Central Invoice Management on SAP BTP provides a unified solution for receiving and managing supplier invoices, with connection to multiple systems such as SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition. With this release, a brand-new machine learning scenario adds efficiencies in this process.

Document information extraction templates in Central Invoice Management enable users to create supplier-specific templates for accurate data extraction from invoices. By correcting extraction errors and training the machine learning model, these templates improve accuracy for future invoices with similar layouts. This ensures higher confidence in data extraction, reducing manual adjustments and enabling seamless invoice posting in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition.

Customize extraction templates to improve accuracy for supplier-specific invoice layouts and ensure precise data extraction.

Interested in more innovation in the release update? Read the other product updates and watch the other videos in this playlist where my team of product experts cover selected lines of business and industries.

The Future of Business, Today: Get Your Access to AI-Assisted Features Thanks to this Limited Promotion Now! 

The 2502 update is a strategic investment that combines advanced AI with powerful enterprise management tools. Whether scaling your business, enhancing productivity, or building sustainable operations, its capabilities help support a more agile and resilient future.

Sign up for following features through the limited Promotion for AI-assisted Features in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition (for all countries, customers, and partners):

  • The easy filter and smart summarization features in SAP Fiori allow for efficient, natural language filtering of business data and seamless summarization capabilities, enabling users to quickly extract relevant information and jump-start subsequent collaboration. 
  • Facilitate easier understanding and interpretation of financial data with insights from cost center reviews and explanations of fixed-asset depreciation keys.

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502亮点前瞻：用户体验（User Experience）
entry.content:
在SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502版本中，关于用户体验（User Experience）方面的重要变化如下：

 

更改公司徽标Logo

在SAP ERP公有云Fiori界面的左上角，默认显示的是SAP的徽标。 

从2408版本开始，添加了一个新的系统参数选项：用于将SAP徽标替换成客户自己的徽标。管理员可以在管理快速启动板设置应用中找到参数COMPANY_LOGO_URL，上传新徽标的文件图片即可。更改完之后的新徽标将对所有用户可见。 

如需改回SAP的徽标，可以到管理快速启动板设置应用中，点击“编辑”，重置恢复成缺省值即可。 

 

右键快速移动部分（Section）

在编辑模式下，你现在可以快速移动页面上的一个部分（Section），点击右键，选择Move Section Up或者Move Section Down：

 

默认显示“复制到剪贴板”按钮

现在在表格中，会默认显示“复制到剪贴板”按钮。可以让用户选择表格中的特定某些单元格，并复制到剪贴板中。只有当用户选择了表格中的内容时，这个按钮才会可用。这项功能针对所有表格类的页面都适应。

更改前：

更改后：

 

与Microsoft Teams的集成：待办事项的通知

有了这个功能，你就可以在Microsoft Teams中收到你在SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition我的主页中待办事项里的任务和情况的通知。你就可以在Teams中直接处理了。

entry.title: SAP Commerce Cloud Q4 ‘24 Release Highlights
entry.content:
Happy New Year! Wishing you a productive and prosperous 2025 from all of us at SAP!

Let’s celebrate a fantastic milestone together! We are thrilled to share that SAP Commerce Cloud concluded 2024 on an exceptionally high note, particularly with a remarkable performance during Cyber Week.

We achieved the following:

  • Facilitated $12.2 billion in Gross Merchandise Value (GMV)
  • 23.4% YoY growth in orders processed and 100% uptime
  • Huge growth in Europe, Middle East, and Africa (EMEA) region and the Asia Pacific and Japan (APJ) region

These achievements highlight the robust capabilities of the SAP Commerce Cloud platform and our continuous investments in infrastructure. They also demonstrate the trust our customers place in us during the busiest shopping season of the year. For a more detailed look at our Cyber Week performance and insights, be sure the check out our comprehensive summary.

We're excited to launch the SAP Open Payment Framework and the Search Service. These innovative SaaS-based capabilities are designed to offer greater flexibility in payment processing and deliver more relevant search results, both of which are essential for boosting sales.

Join us for an in-depth look at the exciting innovations and key features we've introduced to SAP Commerce Cloud over the past three months. Don't miss our Q4 2024 Release Highlights webcast — it's the perfect opportunity to stay updated about the latest advancements!

Additionally, check out the replay of SAP Commerce Cloud 2024 Year in Review, which details the significant capabilities introduced last year. Stay informed and see how these enhancements can benefit your business!

 

Adaptive

Empower shoppers with their preferred payment methods using Open Payment Framework

With SAP Commerce Cloud, Open Payment Framework businesses have the flexibility to choose payment partners that best meet their unique needs and regional markets, allowing them to build at their own pace, scale efficiently, and avoid being locked into a single provider. This will also enable businesses to easily introduce popular new payment options like "buy now, pay later," tapping into new growth opportunities both domestically and internationally.

To streamline the process, we offer pre-integrations with leading Payment Service Providers like Stripe, Adyen, and Worldpay. This makes it easy to get started quickly without the hassle of manual integrations. Shoppers will benefit from a seamless checkout experience, confidently selecting their preferred payment methods.

Our framework addresses all common payment requirements and end-to-end payment processes, including authorization, capture, refunds, and re-authorization, while continuously adapting to evolving security and compliance standards.

SAP Commerce Cloud, Open Payment Framework has been launched in a phased rollout, initially available to customers in the EU and US data centers. Full access for all customers, excluding China, will be available in the second half of 2025.

Open Payment Framework

Boost conversions with highly relevant results using Search Service

At SAP, we are committed to providing our customers with flexible search and merchandising tools for intelligent product discovery, driving sales, and increasing conversions. With that in mind, we’re excited to introduce Search Service – our latest innovation, now available for customers in Europe and North America.

Search Service comes packed with powerful capabilities designed to improve the shopping experience:

  • Flexible Search Indexing and Scoring: Configure and optimize search results to meet your specific business needs.
  • Spell Checking with Word Suggestions: Ensure that customers find what they're looking for, even with typos.
  • Product Variant Grouping: Simplify product searches by grouping similar items together.
  • Visually Configurable Search Bar: Customize the search interface to align with your brand’s aesthetics.

Designed with a global audience in mind, Search Service supports multiple languages and incorporates language-aware synonyms and stop words to enhance user experience across different regions.

As a cloud-based service, Search Service offers a flexible API, automatic updates, and seamless integration with SAP Commerce Cloud. When combined with Intelligent Selling Services, it enables Intelligent Search capabilities, delivering highly relevant results, recent and trending suggestions, and AI-enhanced product results tailored to individual preferences and intent.

Similar to our Open Payment Framework, the Search Service will be rolled out in a phased approach, considering customer size and complexity. Initially, Search Service will be available for customers in European and North American regions through our Early Adopter Care program.

Make the most of these advanced capabilities to boost your conversions and improve your customer experience! Visit our website for more information.

Adaptive Search with boost and promoted product

Experience VIP treatment with the Enhanced Operations Add-on

Introducing the Enhanced Operations Add-on, designed to help large enterprise customers optimize performance and gain deeper insights into their operations. With an impressive Service Level Agreement (SLA) of 99.99%, you can focus on growing your business with minimal downtime. And should any issues arise, a dedicated team of experts will be ready to resolve them swiftly. With enhanced monitoring, proactive intervention, dedicated database administrators and support team members, you can enjoy peace of mind and VIP treatment with the Enhanced Operations Add-on!

Streamline store transactions with POS Sales Transfer and Audit

The latest feature introduced in SAP Order Management Services is POS Sales Transfer and Audit. This powerful tool is designed to streamline your store transactions by storing vast amounts of diverse data for multiple years, complete with ready-to-use aggregation and integration features.

Our sales auditing and data transfer module efficiently ingests and processes large volumes of data, ensuring that your Point-of-Sale information is always consistent and clean. This automation not only simplifies the auditing process but also provides you with an up-to-date and accurate view of your inventory and finances.

By adopting POS Sales Transfer and Audit, you can support a seamless and unified retail business model, making it easier than ever to manage your operations with precision and confidence.

 

Insightful

Enhance your shopping experience with natural conversations and AI

We are thrilled to introduce our new AI-based Shopping Assistant Agent, now available for Early Access. This cutting-edge tool revolutionizes the customer experience by assisting shoppers in finding and comparing products through natural, conversational interactions.

Seamlessly integrating with your e-commerce storefront via a flexible API, the Shopping Assistant Agent connects with SAP product catalogs to provide accurate and up-to-date information. It excels at understanding and processing complex customer queries through intuitive conversations, offering product suggestions tailored to each shopper’s specific needs and interests. This personalized approach not only enhances the shopping experience but also drives conversions by delivering relevant and engaging responses. Get ready to offer your customers an unparalleled shopping journey with our AI-based Shopping Assistant Agent!

AI-based Shopping Assistant Agent

Harness AI to craft insights and content from customer reviews

Introducing the Commerce Review AI tool, designed to leverage Generative AI for creating insightful content and answering questions based on customer reviews. This powerful tool can generate comprehensive review summaries, highlight customer sentiment, and pinpoint key phrases. By acting on summarized feedback and identifying potential issues quickly, you can effectively improve product or solution quality.

In addition, our AI tool taps into product reviews as a valuable data source for the "Ask about this Product" feature, helping customers easily find their ideal product. With the Commerce Review AI tool, you can stay proactive and responsive to customer feedback, enhancing your product offerings and overall customer experience.

 

Connected

Increase order data consistency with SAP Order Management Services integration

We are pleased to announce an enhancement to the integration between SAP Commerce Cloud and SAP Order Management Services. This upgrade allows you to create orders directly in SAP Order Management Foundation, eliminating order replication between the two systems. The integration significantly increases the consistency of your order data, ensuring reliable and accurate order updates.

Seamless data sharing across both your front and back office operations not only improves efficiency but also minimizes the risk of data discrepancies. Enjoy a smoother and more reliable order management process with this enhanced integration.

Connect with the SAP Commerce Cloud support team through SAP for Me

SAP for Me offers a single, convenient entry point for all your support needs with SAP. Whether you need to create support tickets, start a chat, or utilize other real-time channels, SAP for Me makes it easy to connect with the Commerce support team. You can also submit service requests directly to the Commerce operations team.

Using SAP for Me streamlines the problem-solving process, leading to faster response times and more accurate resolutions. It ensures that your requests are directed to the right support teams, so you can get the assistance you need exactly when you need it. Enhance your support experience with SAP for Me!

For more details on the above release features, check out the following resources:

  • Q4 2024 SAP Commerce Cloud Release Readiness Kit
  • Performance Optimization Best Practices
  • SAP Commerce Cloud update cycle
  • SAP Commerce Cloud Release Navigator single access point to release content

SAP Help Portal

  • SAP Commerce Cloud What’s New

Please share your feedback in a comment and follow our SAP Commerce Cloud topic page to connect with the community!

entry.title: Artificial Intelligence & Technology in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502
entry.content:
Welcome to my blog post on Artificial Intelligence and Technologies, showcasing the groundbreaking innovations in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, Release 2502. In this release, we are thrilled to unveil a series of advanced AI-powered features that redefine how businesses interact with their enterprise systems. From Joule, our intelligent AI copilot, to AI-assisted financial insights, and natural language-driven functionalities, these capabilities are designed to elevate user productivity, streamline decision-making, and unlock new levels of operational efficiency. A heartfelt thank you to our talented developers and visionaries for their dedication to driving innovation forward!

Watch my video for an overview of the top new features:

 

 

1. Joule: The AI Copilot

Video: Create Customized Insight Card with Joule

Video: Search Open Sale Order with Joule

 

Joule is now generally available and seamlessly integrated in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition after being in early adoption program. SAP’s AI copilot Joule leverages generative AI to empower users to execute their everyday tasks more efficiently and use natural language to express their business need.

Value Proposition:

  • Enables quick navigation to applications for seamless task execution.
  • Delivers instant insights into critical business data, such as purchase orders.
  • Provides concise summaries of user enablement content for faster task completion.
  • Simplifies personalization of the "My Home" page, improving user productivity.

Capabilities:

  • Recommends relevant applications to users and facilitates seamless navigation.
  • Offers insights about business objects and situations without requiring users to open separate applications.
  • Summarizes help content to answer queries expressed in natural language.
  • Allows users to create preview cards directly in Joule and add them to the "My Home" Insights section.

For more information, see: Joule Capabilities in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

 

Joule for Situation Handling

The integration of SAP's AI copilot Joule with Situation Handling enables users to receive up-to-date information on demand. Joule displays relevant issues, shares additional information, and directs users to the appropriate apps, ensuring a continuous overview of responsibilities while working on their daily tasks.

Value Proposition:

  • Offers intelligent assistance for rapid decision-making and issue resolution.
  • Proactively identifies and addresses issues to avoid operational disruptions or financial risks.

Capabilities:

  • Ask Joule to identify situations requiring attention and provides contextual information.
  • Proposes solutions and directs users to related applications for streamlined resolution.

 

2. General Availability of AI-assisted Features in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

After successful early adopter care programs, we are pleased to announce the general availability of the following AI-assisted features in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Release 2502. The 2502 update is a strategic investment that combines advanced AI with powerful enterprise management tools. Whether scaling your business, enhancing productivity, or building sustainable operations, its capabilities help support a more agile and resilient future.

AI-Assisted Smart Summarization

AI-assisted smart summarization allows you to summarize object pages of SAP Fiori elements-based applications with the help of the power of generative AI.

The summarization can be reviewed and modified in a rich text editor and easily copied into productivity tools, such as email or chat, for follow-ups with co-workers and customers.

Value Proposition:

  • Better understanding of business data
  • Time saving when preparing business data for follow ups
  • Trustworthy AI results
  • Easy editing
  • Efficient sharing

Capabilities:

  • Selection of sections to be summarized
  • Well-structured output
  • Rich text editor for review and edits
  • Copy to clipboard for follow-ups
  • Possibility to leave sentiment of the feature

 

AI-Assisted Easy Filter

AI-assisted easy filter allows you to filter list reports of SAP Fiori elements-based applications through natural language with the help of the power of generative AI.

Instead of manually setting the filter values through type ahead and value helps, you type your search query into the filter field, and you can easily access recent filter queries and favorite queries as well.

Value Proposition:

  • Better understanding of business data
  • Time saving when filtering based on known filter criteria
  • Trustworthy AI results
  • Intuitive, click-efficient user experience, especially for new users

Capabilities:

  • Filtering based on natural language
  • Support of filter fields that are available, but not visible in the filter bar
  • Complex filters like amount and currency, date ranges, etc. are supported
  • Adjustment of the filters in the filter tokens
  • Access to recent filter queries
  • Support to mark recent filters as favorites

 

AI-Assisted Financial Business Insights in Finance

The "Virtual Analyst" within SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition transforms financial data analysis by providing immediate explanations and summarizations of insights in natural language. This AI feature allows users to quickly discover what’s meaningful within selected data in Review Booklets, analyzing extensive data sets, highlighting dependencies, and proposing actions. Benefits include:

  • Immediate Insights: Quick explanations and summarizations of data insights in natural language.
  • Comprehensive Analysis: Analyzes extensive data sets, highlights dependencies, and proposes actions.
  • Intuitive Visualizations: Presents findings in visual, tabular, and plain language formats, aiding management reporting and decision-making.

 

AI-Assisted Error Resolution (SAP Advanced Financial Closing)

AI-Assisted Error Resolution in SAP S/4HANA Cloud offers a comprehensive solution to common error situations. It generates understandable explanations of technical error messages, providing end-users with detailed resolution steps. AI-Assisted Error Resolution in SAP S/4HANA Cloud offers:

  •   Comprehensible Explanations: Generates understandable explanations of technical error messages, making complex issues more accessible to end-users.
  •   Step-by-Step Guides: Provides detailed resolution steps to help users solve errors independently.
  •   Time Savings: Expedites error resolution during critical financial processes, reducing delays and operational pressure. This feature helps end-users resolve common errors independently, improving operational efficiency and reducing reliance on SAP support.

This feature significantly enhances the efficiency and effectiveness of financial reporting and decision-making processes.

 

Form Extension in Localization as a Self-Service

Form Extension in Localization as a Self-Service simplifies and accelerates the process of generating and updating customized forms within SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition. This feature enables businesses to automatically create localized form templates based on specific requirements, bind relevant data sources, and seamlessly upload them into the system. By automating these traditionally manual tasks, organizations can significantly reduce the time and cost associated with form localization—by up to 95%. This enhancement is particularly valuable for companies operating in multiple regions, ensuring compliance with local regulations while maintaining operational efficiency. Designed as a cross-industry solution, this capability empowers businesses to adapt quickly to evolving documentation needs without the complexity of custom development.

More information: Link

 

The Future of Business, Today: Get Your Access to AI-Assisted Features Thanks to this Limited Promotion Now! 

Sign up for following features through the limited Promotion for AI-assisted Features in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition (for all countries, customers, and partners):

  • The easy filter and smart summarization features in SAP Fiori allow for efficient, natural language filtering of business data and seamless summarization capabilities, enabling users to quickly extract relevant information and jump-start subsequent collaboration. 
  • Facilitate easier understanding and interpretation of financial data with insights from cost center reviews and explanations of fixed-asset depreciation keys.

 

3. Beta Programs of New AI-assisted Features in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

Financial Business Insights for Group Financial Statements (Beta)

This feature, currently in beta, introduces cutting-edge capabilities to simplify complex financial reporting. By integrating AI, it helps businesses uncover insights and improve collaboration.

Value Proposition:

  • Supports strategic decisions by explaining complex financial KPIs and merging insights with user comments.
  • Streamlines financial reporting with contextualized summaries of critical data.
  • Enhances collaboration and clarity in financial reviews.

Capabilities:

  • Leverages generative AI to summarize data sets and calculate context-relevant KPIs.
  • Combines data with user comments for richer summaries.
  • Provides filtering and navigation tools based on business insights.

 

Generative AI Recommendations for Situation Handling (Beta)

This feature leverages generative AI to provide context-specific recommendations, tailored to streamline decision-making with targeted recommendations for Situation Handling.
Value Proposition:

  • Delivers context-specific recommendations tailored to users’ responsibilities.
  • Enhances operational performance by reducing response times and streamlining decisions.

Capabilities:

  • "My Situations - Extended" app with AI-generated recommendations.
  • Integrates recommendation services with external data via large language models (LLMs).
  • Provides actionable suggestions based on data context and user responsibilities.

Sign up here: Link

AI-Assisted Easy Enterprise Search

AI-assisted easy enterprise search allows you to use natural language through the power of generative AI to search for business objects across the solution by simply typing your search query in the search field of the SAP Fiori launchpad. 

Value Proposition

  • Time saving when searching for known criteria
  • Trustworthy AI results
  • Intuitive, click-efficient user experience, especially for new users
  • Easy to activate on end-user level

Capabilities

  • Setting for activation / de-activation of the natural language search capability on individual end-user level
  • Natural language support of the search field in the SAP Fiori launchpad
  • Indication that natural language search is enabled in the search field itself

Please register to be part of the SAP Beta Testing of the Newest AI-assisted user experience features in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

Sign up here: Link

 

AI-Assisted Smart Personalization of My Home

AI-assisted smart personalization of My Home allows you to use natural language through the power of generative AI to add insights cards to your My Home experience.

Starting on My Home directly, you can add insights cards using natural language in two clicks including a preview to let the end user review the result generated by AI.

Value Proposition

  • Time saving when adding insights cards
  • Better insights into business data
  • Trustworthy AI results
  • Intuitive, click-efficient user experience, especially for new users

Capabilities

  • One-click action from My Home to trigger the addition of insights cards
  • Support of nine SAP Fiori elements-based apps as basis for insights cards creation during Beta testing
  • Preview during addition of insights cards to ensure data quality and consistency

Please register to be part of the SAP Beta Testing of the Newest AI-assisted user experience features in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

Sign up here: Link

 

AI-Assisted Error Explanation

AI-assisted error explanation supports in understanding errors in SAP Fiori elements-based applications better and provides you with first recommendations how to solve the errors by leveraging the power of generative AI.

Directly embedded in the current error visualization, it gives you the opportunity to generate explanations only when required.

Value Proposition

  • Time saving when solving errors
  • Intuitively integrated into the current error visualization
  • Better insights into errors and recommended solutions
  • Intuitive, click-efficient user experience, especially for new users

Capabilities

  • One-click action from current error visualization to trigger the explanation
  • Well-structured result of the error explanation containing the explanatory part as well as the recommendations part
  • Possibility to leave sentiment of the feature

Please register to be part of the SAP Beta Testing of the Newest AI-assisted user experience features in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

Sign up here: Link

 

AI-Assisted Configuration for US Tax Jurisdictions in Finance

This feature leverages AI to automatically extract key information from natural language sentences or Excel files, setting up jurisdiction-based tax configurations with minimal manual input. The AI-assisted configuration for US Tax Jurisdictions reduces the effort required for users to configure tax settings accurately, minimizing manual errors. Benefits include:

  • Accuracy and Efficiency: Reduces manual errors and enhances setup accuracy.
  • Modernized Onboarding: Natural language interactions and an intuitive interface streamline the onboarding process, cutting down both time and costs.

 

4. Intelligent Scenario Lifecycle Management (ISLM) for Generative AI Use Cases

 

SAP enhances its AI framework with ISLM, providing a robust structure for managing AI use cases. This feature facilitate adoption of generative AI in SAP S/4HANA by managing SAP-delivered and custom AI use cases within a centralized, end-to-end framework.


Value Proposition:

  • Integrate business applications with large language models, simplifying AI implementation and enabling customers and partners to develop custom use cases for transforming core business processes
  • Provide support for predelivered generative AI-based use cases in RISE with SAP
  • Allow the delivery of integrated ISLM and ABAP AI SDK experience, enabling development of generative AI-based use cases, including custom creation
  • Enable turnkey auto-activation for generative AI-based use cases

Capabilities:

  • Manages AI use cases throughout their lifecycle, from exploration to activation.
  • Supports both narrow AI and generative AI use cases.
  • Offers turnkey auto-activation for rapid implementation of AI solutions.

 

📽️ Watch the Replays of Our SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502 Early Release Series!   

Between January 21 and January 24, we conducted a series of 21 engaging live sessions to showcase the thrilling innovations included in the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502 release. If you missed the live sessions, don't worry! You can still access the whole series or select the sessions that interest you the most. Seize this opportunity to watch them on demand at your convenience–anywhere, anytime.  

  

🔎Find All of Our Assets   

SAP S/4HANA Cloud is the foundation of the intelligent, sustainable enterprise and is an innovative, robust, and scalable ERP. We at Cloud ERP Product Success and Cloud Co-Innovation offer a service as versatile as our product itself. Check out the numerous offerings our team has created for you below:   

Link: https://chart-bdmaicr0au.dispatcher.eu2.hana.ondemand.com/index.html?hc_reset

entry.title: SAP Fiori for Android – A Year in Review
entry.content:
SAP Fiori for Android got a new boost in 2024! We rolled out new and improved components and patterns, along with a suite of helpful resources like a revamped Figma design kit and video tutorials.

This upgrade gives app developers and designers enhanced tools to create top-notch enterprise apps on Android. Think of it as a supercharged toolkit for building sleek, user-friendly apps that seamlessly integrate into the SAP ecosystem.

 

New Figma Design Kit for SAP Fiori for Android

The Figma Design Kit “SAP Fiori for Android” is now available on the Figma Community. We’ve improved the kit providing a better user experience, added more helpful information, and fixed bugs to make designing enterprise apps smoother than ever.

Highlights:

  • Comprehensive information card: provides details on usage, technical names, updates, and the component description now links directly to the SAP Design Guidelines.
  • Window size classes support: enhances optimization for different screen sizes.
  • Improved component properties: provides a more structured layout and consistent naming.
  • New page layout: includes usage examples for each component and pattern.
  • Variables for styles: include color modes, accent colors, semantic colors, and icon sizes.
  • Page hierarchy: improved organization for better readability.

You can find the latest SAP Design Kits on Figma.com/community

SAP Fiori for Android Design Kit available on Figma Community

 

New Components & Patterns in the Design System

We’ve released new components and patterns for the design system! In addition, we’ve enhanced existing components and patterns with new features, accessibility improvements aligned with WCAG 2.2, and important bug fixes. Here are a few highlights of the year:

 

Feedback and Progress Indicators

Feedback patterns help users stay informed about intended or unintended situations during app usage. To ensure users are always aware of the system status, additional progress indicators have been added to the design system. These indicators support various use cases and help minimize the perception of disruption during loading or calculations. We introduce the following three new components and patterns:

 

Illustrated Message

The illustrated message pattern combines a solution-oriented message with an engaging illustration and a conversational tone. This approach transforms potentially negative situations into neutral or even positive experiences, making users feel understood and valued.

Illustrated Message in the SAP Design Guidelines

General empty, error and success states examples in the illustrated message

 

Multi-Message Handling

If multiple information, error, or warning messages occur at the same time, the new pattern of multi-message handling provides the user with a clear structure for processing them. Clear iconography and semantic colors guide users in prioritizing their actions based on the importance of each message.

Multiple Message Handling in the SAP Design Guidelines

Multi-message handling pattern on compact and expanded window size class

 

Skeleton Loading

A schematic skeleton representation of content helps communicate anticipated information to the user and allows the system to display partially loaded content while still fetching the complete data.

Skeleton Loading in the SAP Design Guidelines

Skeleton loading patterns with basic placeholders

 

Native File Viewer

The native file viewer allows users to preview their files without leaving the app's context. It supports images, videos, and text-based media.

Native File Viewer in the SAP Design Guidelines

Native file viewer in compact and expanded window size class

 

Multiple enhancements for our components and patterns

From “A” like “Attach” to “T” like “Timeline”, we’ve introduced multiple enhancements to our current components and patterns. You can find a summary of these updates from recent releases on the “What’s New” page in the Figma Design Kits.

What’s new page within the SAP Fiori for Android Design Kit for Figma

 

Updates for BTP SDK for Android 

In 2024, SAP BTP SDK for Android published four major releases, featuring updates to UI components, foundation, flows, and more. Most components and patterns from the SAP Fiori for Android design system are also available out of the box through the SAP BTP SDK. Additionally, our components are now available in Jetpack Compose, making app development even more efficient.

To find out more, check out the release updates.

 

 

New Mobile Design System Services for SAP Customers and Partners

We are excited to announce that the SAP Design System Team now offers services for SAP customers and partners to learn about SAP Fiori for Android and iOS.

Registration form for an SAP Mobile Design Service

 

SAP Fiori for Android & iOS Release Rollouts

In the SAP Fiori for Android and iOS release rollouts, we showcase the latest UI additions and enhancements of the SAP BTP software development kits for Android and iOS. We will then conclude with a demo that walks you through the changes and improved component capabilities.

Based on the release schedule, up to four sessions are planned per calendar year.

Find more information on the Design Services page.

 

UX Feedback Session for Mobile Apps

In the UX Feedback Session for Mobile Apps, we'll explore your mobile solution and gather insights from your experience using the SAP BTP SDK/MDK for Android and iOS.

Our expert mobile UX design team will provide valuable feedback and answer your questions about your app's design and SAP Fiori mobile design components. We're excited to learn about your specific use cases and welcome your suggestions to further improve our mobile UX components.

Find more information on the Design Services page.

 

Publications

Google i/O

SAP Mobile Start was featured at Google i/O 2024 as the first adopter of adaptive layouts. Within the SAP Fiori for Android design system, we leverage adaptive layouts to deliver content for an optimized user experience across various form factors and window size classes.

Learn more about Adaptive Layouts in SAP Fiori for Android.

Using adaptive layouts to transform from a compact to an expanded window size class

 

DevToberfest 2024

DevToberfest, an SAP TechEd Event, is a celebration by developers for developers. It features expert insight, tutorials, collaboration opportunities, and coding sessions.

In our session “Build Elegant Enterprise Apps for Android with SAP Fiori and SAP Build Code”, Natalie Stainton and Mark Fogle will guide you through the process of designing and building a robust, scalable, and functional Android app tailored to your enterprise needs. From design to development, SAP Fiori for Android is used to create a delightful enterprise app. The session will showcase how SAP Fiori for Android is utilized from design to development.

Watch the replay

 

What’s Next

2025 just started. We are excited to announce more updates about SAP Fiori for Android. For the latest updates, please visit our SAP Fiori Design Guidelines.

 

Authors: Marisa Wollner (Design Manager, SAP Fiori for Android) and Yuepei Guo (Design Lead, SAP Fiori for Android)

entry.title: SAP Fiori for Android and iOS 24.12 – New Enhancements and Branching for Design Kits
entry.content:
Wrapping up 2024 and starting into 2025, we keep continuously refining and advancing our mobile design system to empower mobile business app creation at scale. Thanks to insightful feedback from app teams, we've updated existing UI components and rolled out new ones to take mobile app experiences to the next level. We've also aimed for feature parity between SAP Fiori for Android and iOS to ensure a seamless experience and simplified application development across the platforms.

New Design Kits on Figma Community

The Figma Design Kits for Android, iOS, WatchOS and Wear OS are now available on the Figma Community. We’ve also improved the kits providing a better user experience, added more helpful information, and fixed bugs to make designing enterprise apps smoother than ever.


SAP Fiori Design Kits available on Figma Community

In our new Design Kits, your can find comprehensive information cards that provides details on usage, technical names, updates, and the component description now links directly to the SAP Design Guidelines. Besides this, we have Improved component properties, providing a more structured layout and consistent naming along Variables for styles - to include color modes, accent colors, semantic colors, and icon sizes.

You can find the latest SAP Design Kits on Figma.com/community

Introducing Branching Approach in Design Kit

No more creating new design kit versions – from release 24.12 onwards, our Design Kit is updated through a Figma branch, making it easier to update and maintain the library. Simply click on "See all branches" to view details about each update.


Design Kit Versioning with Branches

Major updates to the Design Kit and SDK are identified by release numbers such as 24.12 and include an overview of the updated components. Minor updates, identified by release numbers such as 24.12.1, include bug fixes as well as an overview of the affected components.

New in SAP Fiori for Android 24.12

Check out the latest UI enhancements and additions that our team has been working on for this release.

Avatars

The avatar component that is used to display user profiles, initials, placeholders, icons, or business-related images can now be used in an avatar group with an optional label.

See Avatars to find out more.


Avatar and avatar group variations on compact (left) and expanded screens (right)

Document Scanner

The document scanner leverages Google’s ML Kit, allowing users to digitize physical documents with an on-device flow. Users can select automatic or manual capture and easily edit, retake, or delete specific or all scanned documents. 

For more information, check out the Document Scanner article in the SAP Fiori for Android Design Guidelines.


Document scanner using Google’s ML Kit

Loading State Button

The loading state button is a new button variant featuring a circular progress indicator that appears inside a button when a user-triggered, non-disruptive progress is being processed. It supports various layouts, including a left-aligned button, right-aligned button, two opposite buttons, and text only, with flexible positioning to adapt to different use cases.

See Loading State Button for more details.


From top to bottom: contained loading state button, tonal loading state button, text and icon loading state button

Object Cell

The object cell has been enhanced to provide a more flexible object cell structure and supports nested components such as the rating control and KPI. On top of that, nested components can be easily swapped as needed.

Refer to Object Cell for more details.


Object cells with single actions on the right

Section Header/Footer

The section header can now also be used as a section footer. It supports various layouts, including a left-aligned button, right-aligned button, two opposite buttons, and text only, with flexible positioning to adapt to different use cases. 

Find out more about the Section Footer. 


Section footer with left-aligned button and header (top) and right-aligned button and header (bottom)

Chip Form Cell

The chip form cell has been enhanced with a mandatory field indicator (*) that can be placed next to the label above the chip.

See Chips to learn more about this component.


Single selection chips

Attachment Form Cell

The attachment form cell also supports adding a mandatory field indicator as well as a helper text and an error state.

Check out the Attachent Form Cell article to learn more. 


Attachment form cell as a mandatory field before validation (left) and after validation in error state (right)

Date and Range Picker

The date and range pickers are dialogs used to select a single date or a range of dates. For view-based picker dialogs, it is now possible to add a disabled state for dates and ranges,  minimum/maximum selectable dates, and status indicator decorations for dates.


Selecting a range in the range picker

For more information, refer to Date & Time Pickers.

New in SAP Fiori for iOS 24.12

Next, let’s check out the SAP Fiori for iOS enhancements and additions.

Avatar/Avatar Group

The avatar/avatar group is a new standalone component that is customizable in terms of size, shape, color, and layout. 

See Avatars and Images to find out more.


Examples of Avatars and Profile Images

Document Scanner

The new document scanner leverages Apple’s VisionKit, allowing users to digitize physical documents with an on-device flow. Users can select automatic or manual capture and easily edit, retake, or delete specific or all scanned documents. 

Refer to Document Scanner for more details.


Document scanner

Object Cell

The object cell has been enhanced to provide more flexibility, which mirrors the modular structure of the card component including swappable nested elements such as the rating control. 

Check out the Object Cell guideline article for more details.


Object cell single action variation

Form Cells

The form cell components have been updated with the option to add an asterisk to indicate mandatory fields.

See Attachment Form Cell, Filter Form Cell, Segmented Control Form Cell


Form cells with mandatory field indicator

Rating Control

The rating control now includes the option to display half stars for read-only ratings. You can also add optional leading and trailing text, and users benefit from improved accessibility features.

For more information, check out the Rating Control article in the SAP Fiori for iOS guidelines.


Rating control with label

Step Progress Indicator

The step progress indicator is a progress indicator for tracking and displaying a user’s state in a user flow. With the latest update, you can now choose to use icon nodes as an alternative to numeric and alphabetical nodes.

See Step Progress Indicator for more information.


Step progress indicator on compact (left) and expanded screens (right)

Multi-Message Handling

When a screen contains multiple messages, the banner can show an overview of the type and number of messages with an action link to open a multi-message handling detail view. In the multi-message detail view, it is possible to: filter for a specific message type, clear a single message or all messages of one type, and navigate to the location of the cell with the link.

For further details, see Multi-Message Handling.


Multi-message handling detail view on compact screen (left) and regular screen (right)

Resources

Design Guidelines


SAP Fiori Mobile Design Guidelines for Android and iOS

A detailed documentation on component anatomy, behavior, and interactions allows you to use components that match your use case. Crosslinks to Google’s Material Design Guidelines for Android and Apple’s Human Interface Guidelines for iOS, as well as links to development documentation, help you navigate to these resources. Additionally, you can find a feedback function on each guideline article that allows you to provide feedback.

SAP Fiori for Android Design Guidelines | SAP Fiori for iOS Design Guidelines

Design Kits for Figma


SAP Fiori for Android and iOS Design Kit

With the updated SAP Fiori for Android and iOS Design Kits, it’s now easier than ever to use the latest components and patterns in your mobile design. By using the Design Kits, you can quickly create a consistent user experience that enables app implementations at scale.

SAP Fiori for Android 24.12 Design Kits | SAP Fiori for iOS 24.12 Design Kits

entry.title: SAP User Experience Q1/2025 Update – Part 1: Many New Innovations Available (AI, Joule and More)
entry.content:
This series of posts gives an overview of user experience innovations in the cloud from the last six months, covering our whole portfolio, in particular SAP SuccessFactors and SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502. It also gives an overview of innovations in our UI technologies, making it ever easier to build and integrate UIs.

AI is revolutionizing user experience, giving users capabilities unheard of just a few years ago. SAP is harnessing the power of AI to help business users work more effectively: Joule is your copilot for seamless access to a variety of products a user needs, now covering 80% of the most-used transactions. Generative AI embedded in business applications gives users unprecedented insights and convenience. Beyond that, we continue to provide new applications with a great user experience, as well as UX-enhancing features.

How is AI, and especially generative AI, changing user experience for business users? Essentially via one or more of these patterns:

  • Summarizing business data in an easy to understand way – in text or graphical form.
  • Guiding and Recommending options or actions based on the current business context.
  • Creating proposals for texts or business data and entities such as assignments, performance goals with milestones etc., often based on natural language input.
  • Helping you write texts to people internally and externally, with our AI writing assistant.
  • Interacting via natural language with your application, e.g. search, filtering, analytical queries – as an alternative to established UI interactions.
  • Assisting you with all of the above, wherever you are, for all our cloud products – via Joule, your copilot for SAP systems.

Our overarching goal is to provide a great user experience everywhere. AI is a powerful means for achieving that, but of course you can also have a great user experience in applications without embedded AI.

A good user experience also needs to address teamwork, not just the experience of each individual – in other words, helping SAP users collaborate and work together.

I’ve collected examples from our latest releases to show how we are doing this – starting with our cross-product UX innovations in Joule and central entry points before looking at product UX innovations. Here is what the series will cover; as each part becomes available in the next couple of weeks I will update this list with links to each post:

  1. Central UX Services (this post)
    • Joule – latest UX innovations
    • Central entry points and services:
      • SAP Start / SAP Build Work Zone
      • SAP Task Center
      • SAP Mobile Start
  2. ERP: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502 and SAP Fiori launchpad (AI, Joule and More).
  3. HR: SAP SuccessFactors (AI, Joule and More).
  4. Spend: SAP Ariba and SAP Fieldglass.
  5. Selling: SAP Customer Experience and SAP Industry Cloud – Retail.
  6. Analytics and Platform: SAP Analytics Cloud and SAP Business Technology Platform.
  7. UI Design and Technology for web and mobile.

Before we get started: if you haven’t already seen them, do have a look at the overview of public cloud UX innovations I posted in February and July 2024:

  • SAP UX Innovations in Public Cloud Products, Joule, AI, Entry Points, Apple Vision Pro and more.
  • SAP UX Latest 2024 Innovations in Public Cloud: Joule, GenAI and More.

This series of posts includes Joule and AI UX highlights from the above products, but for a more comprehensive overview of our recent AI innovations and SAP’s Business AI strategy, with many UX examples, have a look at:

  • SAP Business AI: Release Highlights Q4 2024
  • White Paper: SAP Business AI.

Joule User Experience Innovations

Joule is the AI-powered copilot for SAP systems, offering a powerful new user experience, using natural language to access our cloud products and providing a seamless flow for the user.

Now, Joule is generally available for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502, as well as for our central entry points in the web SAP Start and SAP Build Work Zone (both standard and advanced editions). You can find examples in the respective product sections in this series; this section focusses on generic capabilities recently introduced or coming soon for Joule. If you want an overview of what’s new, or want to set up Joule in your landscape, have a look at the documentation:

  • What’s New for Joule.
  • Integrating Joule with SAP Solutions.

Joule already covers 80% of the most-used transactions in SAP systems and 1,200+ skills, tailored to business roles across SAP’s cloud portfolio such as hiring manager, billing specialist, procurement manager etc.

Joule Available on Mobile

Joule is also now generally available for mobile, running natively with SAP Mobile Start. Figure 1 shows examples of Joule running on a mobile phone.

Figure 1: Examples showing Joule integrated in SAP Mobile Start, showing from left to right: the start page, the informational pattern accessing SAP Help Portal, and the transactional pattern used to interact with SAP S/4HANA Cloud and then with SAP SuccessFactors. ALT Text: Four images are shown: the start page shows a “How can I help you” text, followed by some suggested prompts as buttons; the informational pattern shows the prompt “How can I customize a sales order”. Below that, the sixteen-line written answer is shown, followed by a “Search results” selector and three top search results. The navigational pattern shows the prompt “Show sales orders with delivery status not completed”, below that, the reply from Joule “Here’s what I’ve found” is followed by a card containing three lines and an “Open” button. A second transactional example with the prompt “Show profile of Maria Alvares”, followed by the result and a button for navigating to her profile.

On Apple devices you can now use Siri and Siri Shortcuts to seamlessly interact with Joule - which works even better with Apple Intelligence. Simply say "Hey Siri, ask SAP. Show my sales orders with delivery status not completed" and Joule will provide you with the respective content within the app.

Note that as of today, not all your prompts and web apps are supported on the phone; however, we are continuously adding further Joule business skills and scenarios.

Find out more here:

  • Joule on Mobile & Start Screen Personalization: SAP Mobile Start V2.1 - Release Update

Joule Analytical Pattern coming soon

In Q1/2025 we plan to provide a controlled release of the new analytical pattern for Joule, for those products listed above for which Joule is available. General availability currently planned for Q2/2025 (as usual for forward-looking statements, our plans are subject to change). It is powered by SAP Analytics Cloud, with data from models that are indexed by the Just Ask feature of SAP Analytics Cloud.
